prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为553→560→548→563→501名，整体在500–560名区间窄幅波动；2025年位次501名较2024年563名明显前移约62名，为近五年最优水                        平，显示报考热度有所回升；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为42→45→46→45→47人，呈小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划47人，与2025年持平，无计划变动带                         来的额外竞争影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第5、2022–2026年连续稳居第6位，属全国顶尖高校阵营，对高分考生吸引力                         极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（食堂宿舍、学校管理相关舆情），但抖音综合热度排名第17位（高热），短视频曝光量大；2022年曾出现专业组投档线差异的中                        关注信号，但无严重断档记录，整体报考关注度维持高位；南京大学拥有中国语言文学、计算机科学与技术、物理学、化学、天文学、大气科学、工商管理、环                        境科学与工程等10余个A+学科，A-及以上学科超过20个，学科实力顶尖，对优质生源有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等南京大学优                         势工科专业持续高热推荐；河北省2026年物理类考生约36.5万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争格局稳定；南京大学位于江苏                        省南京市，非河北省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜；河北省考生报考省外顶尖985需与全国考生竞争，但南京大学作为华东五校之一，品牌号召力强劲。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025                         年位次496名为近五年最佳、2026年招生计划持平、考生总数稳定、学校层次顶尖且学科优势突出，预计2026年物理类最低位次维持在496名附近；预测最低位次约496名，区间439–553名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 553→560→548→563→501, fluctuating narrowly within the 500–560 range; in 2025, the ranking of 501 moved significantly forward by about 62 places compared to 2024's 563, marking the best level in five years, indicating a rebound in application enthusiasm; from 2021 to 2025, enrollment plans for Physics Category were 42→45→46→45→47, showing a slight expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 47, unchanged from 2025, with no additional competition impact from plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 5th in the 2021 Soft Science China University Rankings and consistently 6th from 2022 to 2026, belonging to the top-tier national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring students; in 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (related to cafeteria, dormitory, and school management public opinion), but Douyin comprehensive popularity ranks 17th (high heat), with large short video exposure; in 2022, there was a signal of concern about differences in admission cutoffs among major groups, but no serious gaps were recorded, overall application attention remains high; Nanjing University has more than 10 A+ disciplines including Chinese Language and Literature, Computer Science and Technology, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Atmospheric Science, Business Administration, Environmental Science and Engineering, and over 20 disciplines rated A- or above, with top-tier disciplinary strength, continuously attracting high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other advantageous engineering majors at Nanjing University continue to be highly recommended; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hebei Province is about 365,000, basically unchanged from 2025, with a stable competitive landscape; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Hebei, with no local enrollment preference; Hebei candidates applying for top 985 universities outside the province need to compete with candidates nationwide, but as one of the East China Five Universities, Nanjing University has strong brand appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 ranking of 496 being the best in five years, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, stable total number of candidates, top-tier school level, and outstanding disciplinary advantages, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will remain around 496; predicted minimum ranking is about 496, with a range of 439–553.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science and Technology

- Computer Science and Technology (Computer Finance Experimental Class) (Double Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Software Engineering
- Technology Science Experimental Class (Intelligent Science and Technology, Integrated Circuits, etc.)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Optoelectronics, Carbon Neutrality, Biomedical Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Life Sciences)
- Software Engineering (Software Engineering Economics Innovation Class) (Double Degree)
- Engineering Experimental Class (School of Future Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 439–553, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, Kuang Yaming) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Chemistry and Life Sciences) as safe backups. If your ranking is better than the lower bound of the range (within 444), you can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (around 558), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2 to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 116 → 143 → 147 → 167 → 181, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 65 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 16 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 181; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for History Category were 5 → 10 → 12 → 13 → 13, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 18, an expansion of about 38.5% compared to 13 in 2025, a significant expansion that will effectively alleviate competition pressure and push the ranking number larger (i.e., the minimum ranking moves backward).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking steadily 6th nationally in the Soft Science rankings, belonging to top comprehensive universities with profound foundations in literature, history, and philosophy, strongly attracting high-scoring History Category candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (cafeteria and dormitory public opinion), but the Douyin popularity ranking is 17th (high heat), with overall attention not diminishing; in 2022, there was a medium-attention signal of differences in major group admission cutoffs, with no record of serious gaps; Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Philosophy A, Law A, Sociology A, Chinese History A, Journalism and Communication A-, etc., the literature, history, philosophy, and law disciplines are top-tier, strongly attracting History Category candidates. Law is polarizing but still a popular liberal arts major, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 245,000, roughly the same as in 2025.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Nanjing University is located in Nanjing City, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Hebei Province; as one of the East China Five Universities, it has cross-provincial appeal for top national History Category students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of History Category rankings (average about 16 places per year), the significant 38.5% expansion in 2026 that will push rankings further backward, and the stable total number of candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is about 233, with a range of 183–283.

- Law (Foreign-Related Rule of Law Talent Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Law, Sociology, Public Administration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- No separate low-score majors currently; the ranking differences among the above majors are small, so it is recommended to choose based on personal interests and career plans.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 183–283, since there are few History Category majors and the ranking differences are small, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class, Social Sciences Experimental Class) as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors (Economic Management Experimental Class, Law Foreign-Related Class) as a reach. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 183), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 283), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.
